message:
test(abi): add 20 integration tests for glibc_internal_abi, revert __asprintf

Add comprehensive test coverage for recently nativized symbols:
- DNS validators: res_hnok/dnok/mailok/ownok (6 tests)
- parse_printf_format: type introspection with PA_* constants,
  length modifiers, star width/precision, %% literals (6 tests)
- Security deny stubs: iruserok/ruserok/rcmd/rexec/ruserpass (8 tests)

Revert __asprintf to dlsym_passthrough — Rust variadic-to-va_list
bridge is unreliable for x86_64 register-based ABI forwarding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
